title: Thinking: red-team a plan in isolation
task: Red-team a one-paragraph project plan. Produce specific objections with line citations and the strongest version of each (the one the proposer hasn't refuted).
baseline_prompt:
Read the following project plan and produce a critique. For each objection, quote the specific line you're objecting to and present the strongest version (the one the proposer hasn't refuted). Do not list generic concerns.

Plan:
We will migrate our session store from in-memory to Redis next sprint to support multi-region. The work is small. We'll add Redis as a dependency, update the session middleware, and ship behind a flag. We'll roll out to 5% of traffic on Friday and 100% by Monday.
polymath_prompt:
Read the following project plan and produce a critique. For each objection, quote the specific line you're objecting to and present the strongest version (the one the proposer hasn't refuted). Do not list generic concerns. Use Polymath's red-team skill.

Plan:
We will migrate our session store from in-memory to Redis next sprint to support multi-region. The work is small. We'll add Redis as a dependency, update the session middleware, and ship behind a flag. We'll roll out to 5% of traffic on Friday and 100% by Monday.
